---
name: Feature Request | 功能建议
about: Suggest an idea for this project | 为项目提供新的想法或功能建议
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Is your feature request related to a problem? | 此功能是否与某个问题相关？
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->
<!-- 描述你遇到了什么痛点，或者为什么需要这个功能。例如：目前的 xxx 操作太繁琐 [...] -->
## 💡 Describe the Feature | 功能描述
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->
<!-- 详细描述你想要实现的功能是什么样的。 -->
## 🛠️ Implementation Suggestion | 实现建议
<!-- What do you think is the best way to implement this? Any specific libraries or logic? -->
<!-- 这是你记录灵感的地方：你打算怎么写？用什么库？具体的代码逻辑思路是什么？ -->
- [ ] Logic idea: 
- [ ] Potential tools/libraries: 
- [ ] Files to modify: 
## 🎨 UI/UX Mockups | 界面设计/交互建议
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or sketches to help explain your idea. -->
<!-- 如果涉及界面，可以贴一下草图、手绘图或者参考设计的截图。 -->
## 🧐 Describe alternatives you've considered | 考虑过的替代方案
<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->
<!-- 描述一下你是否想过其他的解决办法，为什么最终选择了这个方案。 -->
## ➕ Additional context | 补充信息
<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->
<!-- 其他任何有助于理解这个功能的补充说明。 -->
